top.title: Fuze T50 Tilt Wheelchair
top.body: This Fuze T50 Wheelchair with tons of accessories was purchased in 2020 for $6700 and it's barely been used.  First reasonable offer will be accepted.  Thanks. The following is a description of the Fuze T50 wheelchair: The Fuze T50 Manual Tilt Wheelchair provides 50 degrees of tilt and zero center of gravity shift. It unique tilt system makes it look and feel like a high-end ultralightweight wheelchair.  The Fuze T50 easily manoeuvres either in tilt or out of tilt, increasing independence for the user Features •                    Unique Pivot Point Location For Zero Center Of Gravity Shift and effortless operation •                    50 degrees of tilt allowing for better posture and positioning •                    Short wheelbase allows the chair to be extremely manoeuvrable. •                    Lightweight frame with small overall footprint for better manoeuvrability •                    Stylish and functional https://hmebc.com/wp-content/uploads/Fuze-Manual-March-172.pdf

top.title: HP ENVY WIRELESS 6400e All-In-One Printer - Like New
top.body: This printer is like new.  I bought it at Best Buy about 4 years ago or so at around $300.00. I preferred my old school printer, non wireless internet setup, etc.  I was past the 30 days to return it so it has just sat here all this time. I'd like to get rid of it and it's a great deal for someone who wants a great printer for only $25.00 cash.  I was fine with this printer as I decided on it with a lof of help from a Best Buy Tech person, however I just like my old one better due to what I need it for. Of course you will have to buy inks.  You can get them through Amazon or locally and once they are done, simply find a place to get them refilled at half the cost. Curbside Pickup Only: Haro/Denman - 1755 Haro Street Thanks.

top.title: Vintage Toshiba LCD TV
top.body: Toshiba Integrated High Definition LCD Television bought new in 2008. Free for anyone willing to pick up the TV.  Comes with remote and user manual. The top 1/3 of the screen is a little dimmer than the bottom 2/3 of the screen.  The top 1/3 of the screen brightens a bit as the TV warms up but does not get as bright as the bottom 2/3 of the screen.  I have been using as my primary TV until now but the TV is too large for my new space. TV dimensions: Length 49-3/8 inches, Height ~31 inches without stand, Depth ~4 inches Height with pedestal stand: 33 inches, Pedestal stand dimensions: Depth 12.5 inches, Length 21.5 inches

recent.title: TV Wall Mount Full Motion Swivel Tilt Gray Supports
Honeywell Aurora Pet Immune PIR Motion Sensor
recent.body: The Honeywell Aurora PIR Motion Sensor combines razor-sharp motion detection with split-zone optics and pet immunity to reduce pet-induced false alarms while providing incomparable area security.  Passive infrared technology to deliver unparalleled motion detection accuracy. It avoids false alarms caused by pets weighing 40 pounds (18 kg) or less, has a low current draw, and operates in complete silence.  ASIC-based processing will keep you safe while improving space and cost efficiency.  Split-Zone Optics and advanced ASIC-based processing give the pet immune Aurora laser-sharp detection. Features: ♦ Immune to pets up to 40 pounds / 18 kilograms ♦ Advanced ASIC-based processing ♦ Split-Zone Optics technology ♦ Ultra-low current ♦ Totally silent relay operation ♦ Tamper proof design Technical Specifications: ♦ Range: 35 x 45 ♦ Detectable walk rate: 0.5 - 10/sec ♦ Signal Proc.: Intermediate, Std, Harsh ♦ Temp comp: Advanced dual-slope ♦ Alarm relay: Form A ♦ Input voltage: 8-14VDC ♦ Standby current: 4mA ♦ Indicators: Red LED ♦ Operating temp: 14F to 122F / -10C to 50C ♦ Dimensions: 2.9"W x 4.1"H x 1.5"D / 7.36cm-W x 10.4cm-H x 3.8cm-D ♦ UPC: 781410259195 This item details: ♦ New in undamaged, factory sealed retail box ♦ Currently available: 4 Discounts: ♦ 1st for $12 ♦ 2nd for $11 ♦ 3rd for $10 ♦ 4th for $9 ♦ Other CL-unlisted alarm sensors, parts, etc (upon your visit, $5-10) Alarm Parts from BCSpyder

Featuring an oven with 2 racks and 7 rack positions, it lets you cook multiple dishes at once. The proprietary ProBake Convection technology ensures uniform heat distribution throughout the oven for perfect baking results. A modern addition to busy kitchens •	30-inch electric range with slide-in installation design offers a sophisticated, built-in look between your existing countertops •	Spacious 6.3 cu. ft. oven capacity is ideal for cooking large-sized family meals or hosting dinner parties in weekends •	LG ProBake true convection heating element is placed at the back of the oven interior for uniform heat circulation, so you'll get perfect baked results every single time •	Five cooktop elements feature 3,200W of maximum wattage rating to accommodate a variety of pots and pans •	Integrated broil element of 4,200W offers rapid heating for cooking roasts and turkeys •	Built-in AirFry feature makes it easy to cook your favourite foods to crispy perfection without any need of pre-heating •	Two racks and 7 rack positions let you place large-sized casseroles and cookie trays in the oven •	Innovative InstaView window with internal LED light lets you know the cooking status by knocking twice on the door to help prevent heat dismissal •	Convenient Wi-Fi connectivity allows you to monitor and control the appliance through companion ThinQ smartphone app •	Compatible with Google Assistant, Amazon Alexa, SideChef, and Innit for effortless voice control •	EasyClean function gives a fresh, sparkling oven in just 3-step, 10-minute cleaning process - spray some water inside, press the button, and wipe-off any leftover grime Dimensions: •	Width: 76.2cm (30"); •	Height: 92.96cm (36.6"); •	Depth: 74.4cm (29.29") Prices may vary depending on cosmetic condition of the product and are as marked in store. *Because our inventory changes frequently, please contact us to verify stock.* NO PRESSURE NO COMMISSION SALES STAFF. BUY WITH CONFIDENCE. WE HAVE BEEN IN BUSINESS SINCE 2006 Avoid buying from CURBERS selling out of their garages and FLY-BY-NIGHT sellers Over 15000 sq. ft. of Appliances and Electronics. Huge selection. Lots of Free Parking. Easy Access Most products come with 1 year warranty. Extended warranty is also available. We accept Cash, Visa, Mastercard, Debit and Email money transfer. WESTERN CANADA'S LARGEST DISCOUNT APPLIANCE RETAILER IT'S SIMPLE, NO ONE BEATS OUR PRICES !! APPLIANCES READY TO GO, PICK UP AND DELIVERY AVAILABLE. Come and Visit us: 2 Locations to serve you. recent.title: UB40 – Labour Of Love - PRE BAR CODE - NEAR MINT CD
recent.body: NOTE: I am Starting to List over 100,000 Vinyl Records, CDs, Cassette Tapes, DVDs, Video Games, etc. from Collections I have acquired for over 40 Years. Lots of RARE & Premium Condition Albums will be listed Daily so Reserve Your Favorites. I will be Using Images from an Online Resource to assist the Process. The Actual Albums may be nicer than the images but certainly no worse and we will do our best to give you the correct Label Info & "Grade" Respectfully. Please SAVE my Sellers Other Items Link and use the Search Term "VINYL". I am Happy to Assist and Answer Any Questions You May Have. Thank You. UB40 – Labour Of Love - PRE BAR CODE - NEAR MINT CD E-Transfers Accepted. Media Condition: Near Mint (NM or M-) Sleeve Condition: Near Mint (NM or M-) Label: Virgin – DEP CD5, DEP International – DEP CD5 Format: CD, Album, Pre-Emphasis Country: Europe Released: 1984 Genre: Reggae Style: Reggae-Pop 1		Cherry Oh Baby Written-By – Eric Donaldson 3:18 2		Keep On Moving Written-By – Curtis Mayfield 4:37 3		Please Don't Make Me Cry Written-By – Winston Tucker 3:26 4		Sweet Sensation Lead Vocals – Robin Campbell Written-By – Leslie Kong 3:42 5		Johnny Too Bad Keyboards [Additional] – Jackie Mittoo Lead Vocals – Norman Hassan Written-By – Crooks*, Bexford*, Wilson*, Bailey* 4:57 6		Red Red Wine Written-By – Neil Diamond 5:21 7		Guilty Lead Vocals – Norman Hassan Written-By – Tiger (8) 3:16 8		She Caught The Train Keyboards [Additional] – Jackie Mittoo Trumpet – Josh Fifer Written-By – Joe Monsano* 3:17 9		Version Girl Written-By – Boy Friday 3:27 10		Many Rivers To Cross Keyboards [Additional] – Jackie Mittoo Vocals – Jackie Graham*, Mo Birch, Ruby Turner Written-By – Jimmy Cliff 4:31 Phonographic Copyright ℗ – Virgin Records Ltd. Phonographic Copyright ℗ – DEP International Phonographic Copyright ℗ – DEP International Ltd. Mastered at The Abattoir, Birmingham & The Town House, London. recent.title: Brand New Lightweight Goggles
recent.body: Available are brand new , unused Unopened except for the 6 that I opened for all  pictures. Each pair with its own reusable ziplock factory sealed bag. Lightweight .24lbs each with clear lens and each side and corners vented to avoid fogging up the lens while you are mixing up ingredients hot or cold ,grinding metal,mulching, automotive , working with power tools ,cutting up tree branches, or working  as a chemist or with liquids that are under pressure . Black rear band easy to adjust for his or her comfort . Priced very fair at a cheap price of 4$ a piece You have to admit 4$ is cheap for being able to protect one of the most important things we need in life. Purchase the 1st  10pair at 4$ then any additional goggles will be priced at 3$ firm Our purchaser at work placed an order , but put in the wrong amount . Company loss can be your gain We are in Surrey if you wish to pass by and look at the goggles.

recent.body: Dark cherry wood TV stand/media console in excellent condition. Solid, sturdy build with beautiful rich finish that still looks great. Features 4 doors (glass panel center doors + solid wood side doors), an adjustable interior shelf, and plenty of storage space for consoles, receivers, and accessories. Has a built in hole in the center for wires to pass through for things like routers and connection cables.Will be fully cleaned before pickup. A great piece that would elevate any living room setup. Pick up only $25 - negotiable

recent.title: Orgone Pyramid
recent.body: Orgone Pyramids for Your Health Orgonite is a combination of crystal and metal suspended in resin, and it is based on the scientific research of Wilhelm Reich. This research culminated in the existence of what he termed orgone energy. This energy is similar to what the ancients have called prana, chi, or universal energy. When orgonite is within range of a source of negative energy (like electromagnetic frequencies Ñemfs), it is believed to continuously transform it into positive energy. Orgonite is used to improve health, sleep, mood and overall energy. Place these around your home or office. Place in your bedroom, your child's bedroom and playroom. Place in your garden or near your plants to help them grow. Place on top of or near TV, Electronics, WIFI Routers, computers, laptops. Place near your smart meter. Place near where you charge your cell phone. Place in your pets bed to help calm and protect them too from negative emf. The four sides of a pyramid, joining at the summit or peak can be used as inspirational symbols of growth or ascension. Pyramids are considered by many to amplify and focus energy tightly through the apex. 5 to choose from: Amethyst, Lapis Lazuli, Rose Quartz, Tourmaline, or Chakra a Combination of 6 semi precious stones! Amethyst is combined with a quartz point, copper flakes and a copper spiral. They are suspended within a resin matrix to create this orgone pyramid. Amethyst is the purple variety of quartz crystal composed of silicon dioxide with traces of iron. As a healing stone it is said to be helpful in ridding nightmares. Just hold the Amethyst crystal on the forehead for a minute and ask it to guide you through a peaceful sleep, then place it under your pillow. Also helpful to calm an overworked and over stressed mind. It is thought to dispel negativity and create a peaceful environment. Lapis Lazuli is combined with a quartz point, copper flakes and a copper spiral. They are suspended within a resin matrix to create this orgone pyramid. The most important mineral component of lapis is lazurite. A number of other minerals may be contained within the stone such as calcite, pyrite and sodalite. Ground lapis was the secret of the blue in ultramarine, the pigment which painters used to paint the sea and the sky until the nineteenth century. Used by some as a protective stone, it is said to be grounding with a strong connection to the earth and spirits of nature. Rose Quartz is combined with a quartz point, copper flakes and a copper spiral. They are suspended within a resin matrix to create this orgone pyramid. Note that this natural rose quartz has been treated to enhance the colour of the stone. Rose quartz is a member of the largest family of stones, the silica group and is composed of silicon dioxide with traces of titanium. It is said to emits a calming, cooling energy which can work on all of the chakras to gently remove negativity and to reinstate the loving, gentle forces of self-love. The pink colour of rose quartz has been symbolic of love throughout the ages. Black tourmaline is combined with a quartz point, copper flakes and a copper spiral. They are suspended within a resin matrix to create this orgone pyramid. Tourmaline is the most multicolored mineral type known, occurring in virtually every color of the spectrum. It has many interesting optical properties. When viewed through their vertical axis, some specimens appear darker or differ in color than when seen through their horizontal axis. Certain Tourmalines exhibit a cat's eye effect when polished. This mineral is also piezoelectric which means that through mechanical action an electric pulse is formed, similar to quartz. Tourmaline is sought after as a talisman of protection to deflect and counteract negative energies. It is also used to guard against radiation and environmental pollutants. Chakra: Six gemstones (amethyst, lapis lazuli, green aventurine, yellow jasper, carnelian and red jasper) aligned with the chakra system are combined with a quartz point, copper flakes and a copper spiral. They are suspended within a resin matrix to create this orgone pyramid. The word Chakra comes from an ancient Indian language known as Sanskrit, chakra means vortex, spinning wheel or circle. Chakras are the major centres of spiritual power in the human body and are circles of energy which balance, store and distribute the energies of life all through our physical body along the subtle body. The subtle body is the non physical body or otherwise known as our soul or spirit, which overlays our physical body. Each are approximately 70 mm x 70 mm square base x 55 mm high May not be exactly as shown in picture, slight variations as uniquely hand made. Recommended you put one in each corner of your home. $25 each or buy 3 for $70
